name: DoubleVerify Holdings, Inc.
business: DoubleVerify provides a media effectiveness platform that uses AI to measure digital ad quality, including fraud detection, viewability, brand suitability, and geography verification. It sells to advertisers and supply-side customers such as publishers and ad platforms.

exposures.sentence: We are one of the industry s leading media effectiveness platforms that leverages artificial intelligence ( AI ) to drive superior outcomes for global brands.
Our solutions are designed to safeguard advertisers against increasingly sophisticated invalid digital traffic, such as bot fraud, site fraud, malware (including adware), and app fraud.

catalysts.sentence: In March 2025, we acquired Rockerbox, Inc. ( Rockerbox ), a global leader in marketing attribution.
Launched in June 2025, DV Authentic AdVantage is our AI-powered performance optimization solution designed to help advertisers improve campaign outcomes across proprietary video platforms.
On May 16, 2024, the Company announced that its Board of Directors (the Board ) authorized the repurchase of up to $150.0 million of the Company s outstanding common stock (the Repurchase Program ).

catalysts.event: Authorization of additional share repurchase program
catalysts.sentence: On November 6, 2024, the Company announced that the Board authorized the repurchase of up to an additional $200.0 million of the Company s outstanding common stock (the New Repurchase Program ).
On February 18, 2026, the Board authorized the repurchase of up to $300.0 million of the Company s outstanding common stock (the February 2026 Repurchase Program ).

tamClaims.claim: Global digital ad spend (ex-search) reached $378 billion in 2025, expected to grow to $518 billion by 2029.
tamClaims.sentence: Magna Global estimated that global digital ad spend, excluding search, reached $378 billion in 2025 and is expected to grow to $518 billion by 2029.
